name: winter_heavy_burn
description: Real pro_plus_6dde, Dec 20 2025 - Jan 7 2026. Cold, heavy heating draw, no refill. NOTE: the last week warms 17->45 F, so the propane expands and the raw level drops less than the true mass consumed; the temperature-corrected burn (~10 gal/day) is higher than the raw drawdown (~7) - the correct result.

name: spring_moderate_burn
description: Real pro_plus_7063, Mar 2026. Moderate shoulder-season draw, swinging temps 20-66 F.

name: summer_light_burn
description: Real pro_plus_7063, Jun 2026. Warm, near-flat tank, consumption below the sensor noise floor.

name: late_winter_small_refill
description: Real pro_plus_7063, Feb 2026. Late winter with a small (~18 gal) top-off early in the month.

name: winter_midmonth_refill
description: Extrapolated: winter heavy burn (real 6dde temps/levels) with a +160 gal delivery at the midpoint. Tests that a refill is ignored and burn is measured only after it.

name: summer_midmonth_refill
description: Extrapolated: summer light burn (real 7063 Jun) with a +180 gal delivery at the midpoint.

name: steady_synthetic_3gal
description: Pure synthetic: exactly 3.0 gal/day, constant temperature, no noise. Ground-truth accuracy check.

name: flat_no_consumption
description: Pure synthetic: zero consumption with +/-2 gal sensor noise. Must read ~0, never wildly positive/negative.

name: winter_with_sensor_gap
description: Real winter burn with a ~2.5 day sensor dropout in the middle. Must not crash or emit a spurious spike.
